orders.ServiceInstructions:
Monthly Commercial Service to follow the below specs :

• Coverage: See Map in account as well for locations 
    o Emery Pump Station
    o Stearns Pump Station
    o Dudley Pump Station
    o Pickman Pump Station
    o Chestnut Pump Station  
    o Clubhouse
    o Barn Exterior
    o Hay Storage Area
• Program Overview:
    o Monthly Service
    o Pump Stations and Clubhouse
        ? Includes Rodent Control and General Pest Control focusing on carpenter ants and bees/wasps on both the interior and exteriors
        ? Minor rodent exclusion also included where appropriate
    o Barn Exterior & Hay Storage Area
        ? Includes Rodent Control only. We will focus primarily on non-chemical means of rodent control such as trapping. If rodent baiting is recommended, this would only be done with your approval and as a last resort
      
This will be done monthly & in summer will be done same time as T&M

orders.ServiceInstructions:
PLEASE SEE INSPECTION REPORT FOR ACCOUNT NOTES 

** MUST BE FIRST MONDAY OF EVERY MONTH 

Platinum service interior and exterior.  We are monitoring to detect termite activity. If activity is found, please alert management and BDC as the customer will need to purchase soil treatment in order for the monitoring to be changed to active baiting.

During April-May and August-September services, technician MUST perform a full interior/exterior inspection for termite activity. Technician must also service all termite monitors installed on premises. Termite monitors must be inspected/serviced at least 2 times per year.

Have a wonderful day!

orders.TechnicianComment: Today we performed your platinum service. Inspected interior spaces. Two mice removed from laundry room crawlspace. Granular bait was left in a bait station in bathroom to control silverfish. Glue boards replaced in attic to also control silverfish as a fair amount of silverfish were found. We then applied a granular bait around perimeter of main house to control crawling insects including ants. We then inspected pool house and applied granular bait in gap by shower

orders.TechnicianComment:
Today we arrived for an upper cat guard and bat initial. 

Work performed. 

- acquired measurements from dormers for pac man fabrication. 

- fabricated all metal need for seal up. 

- installed Pac-Man on all dormers. 

- applied silicone where necessary for full seal. 

- installed a bat cone on back side of home. Right side of back dormer. 

This completes today’s work. 

Thanks. 

Nate & Ty.
